subject: A gaunt winged demonic creature plummeting headfirst through a void of broken wooden planks, snapped chains, and falling debris; the creature's wings are tattered black-feathered, and its head is wreathed in a cluster of small ghostly screaming faces
description: A scrawny demonic-bird-like creature is captured mid-plunge against a vast pale-blue void. Its body is thin and brownish with elongated limbs and a vulture-like beak; its outstretched wings are ragged dark-feathered and trailing tatters. Where a face would be, a cluster of small open-mouthed ghostly faces blooms upward like smoke. Broken wooden planks, splintered beams, and lengths of heavy iron chain tumble through the air around the figure, all drawn toward an unseen abyss below. The lighting comes from below, throwing the creature into silhouette against shafts of pale light.
foreground: winged creature plummeting head-down, surrounded by broken planks and chains
background: pale blue void with shafts of light and tumbling debris
